name: Spirit with Eyes of Blue
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>青</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Level 4 or lower Dragon or Spellcaster monster
You cannot Special Summon, except Dragon monsters. You can only use each of the following effects of "Spirit with Eyes of Blue" once per turn. If this card is Link Summoned: You can take 1 "Mausoleum of White" from your Deck and either add it to your hand or send it to the GY. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your hand or GY, but if you Special Summoned an Effect Monster from your GY by this effect, it cannot attack and its effects are negated.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Advent of the Eyes of Blue
Structure Deck: Advent of the Eyes of Blue Legendary Majesty Inheritance Pack

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
